notifications.reminderBody: Even 200 characters is progress. Open the app and get started! 📝

validation.projectTitleTooLong: Project title is too long (200 characters max)
validation.projectTargetInvalid: The goal must be a number >= 0
validation.projectDescTooLong: Description is too long (10000 characters max)
validation.noteTitleTooLong: Title is too long (200 characters max)
validation.noteContentTooLong: Content is too long (10000 characters max)

errors.supabaseNotInit: Supabase is not initialized. Check VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.
errors.notAuthorized: Not authorized. Sign in to the cloud before syncing.

help.progress: Log how many characters you wrote today. Even a little counts — it powers your charts, streak and forecast.
help.projects: Your books and manuscripts: character goal, deadline, status. Open a project to manage chapters and see a finish forecast.
help.focus: A writing timer: set the time, write without distractions, then log the session result.
help.notes: Quick notes and ideas — plot, names, hooks. Stored locally, like everything else.
help.sync: Move data between devices: export/import a file, or optional cloud sync via your own Supabase.
help.reports: Reports and images for the day, week, month, year and per project — for your archive or to share.
help.achievements: Badges for milestones: first characters, day streaks, a finished book. They unlock automatically as you progress.
help.records: Your all-time bests by the numbers — most characters in a day, the most days written without a gap, and peak pace.
help.calendar: An activity map by day, like GitHub: the busier the day, the brighter the cell.
